headline: LGBTQ consumers cut spending at Target, Walmart, Amazon over DEI
summary: Nearly 72% of LGBTQ+ consumers say they buy fewer products from companies they see as reducing diversity commitments, a new HRC survey found

raw.headline: LGBTQ consumers cut spending at Target, Walmart, Amazon over DEI

headline: Egglife Expands Its Sweet Side With New Chocolate Egg White Wraps
summary: Egglife Foods, Inc., the Chicago-based brand known for reimagining flour-based foods using the power of eggs, today announced the launch of its newest flavor innovation: Chocolate egglife EGG WHITE WRAPS, now available exclusively at Target stores.

headline: Target (TGT) Appoints Isaac Mizrahi As First Ever Creative Director At Large
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) has appointed designer Isaac Mizrahi as its first-ever creative director at large. The new role focuses on design leadership, brand direction, and product collaboration across the business. Mizrahi is set to mentor Target's internal design teams and help shape future product lines and partnerships. For investors watching Target, this appointment highlights how the company is leaning further into design and branding as a core part of its retail model. Target competes with...

headline: LAIRD SUPERFOOD® EXPANDS PRODUCT LINE AT TARGET TO INCLUDE FUNCTIONAL MUSHROOM COFFEES
summary: Laird Superfood, Inc. (NYSE American: LSF), a leader in functional coffee, creamers, and superfood products made with simple, minimally processed ingredients, has expanded its offerings at Target stores nationwide to include Organic PERFORM Functional Mushroom Coffee and DEFEND Functional Mushroom Coffee. This expansion is in line with the company's mission to make clean, functional, and delicious superfoods more accessible to more consumers.

headline: She Built SmartSweets for Her Grandmother. Now She's Building Snackish for Her Daughter.
summary: The woman who rewrote the candy aisle just walked into the chip aisle. Today, Snackish launches on shelves across North America. Founded by Vancouver's Tara Bosch, the Snackish vision was born when her daughter Willa became obsessed with potato chips, a love Tara shared, and Bosch set out to change what a chip could be. She had done it before, dropping out of college to test recipes in her kitchen and build SmartSweets into a category-defining success before its reported $360 million acquisition

headline: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
summary: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
